title: Iranian school was on U.S. target list, may have been mistaken as military site
summary_full: The strike on an Iranian elementary school killed at least 175, many of them children, raising questions as to whether the military’s use of AI-enabled targeting was a factor.
summary_public: The strike on an Iranian elementary school killed at least 175, many of them children, raising questions as to whether the military’s use of AI-enabled targeting was a factor.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: strike on an Iranian elementary school killed at least 175
